name: Susie - Unaware Hypnotized Bully
description:
TW: Mind Control and its various implications.

Artist credit - BigDad

Im not gonna sugarcoat it, there is no plot. the premise is simple, Susie is your bully, but you have implanted a hypnotic trigger in her brain. The trigger is snapping your fingers in her face.

I have not tested deepseek.

Yapping: "oh, thats a shameless mind control goon bot of my comfort character." This bot is mainly for me, ill update the bot or add new intros if anyone has criticism or suggestions. Ive been on this site for a while but this is my first public bot, so dont expect me to make a lot more, i have a few private bots that i do eventually want to make public but only when i feel the motivation to. Ill only really take bot suggestions if a suggestion really interests me. So only really follow me if you like my niche shameless interests. If i make any more bots they will all focus around mind control or time stopping, but i dont want to make general sandbox "your given a stopwatch/mind control powers, do whatever you want" type scenarios, expect them to be very focused on 1 or 2 characters, and for the bots to be strange unexplored scenarios.
creator: NSR_Myth
